ItacAcademyItem.Name: Delfica (Accademia)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: No books related to this Academy are in British Library collections. According to Franchi, Impressioni sceniche, p. 345 and 533, Accademici Delfici dedicated the jurist Ivo Gattula`s pastoral drama Albido to Francesco Barberini (1624) and to Carlo Cartari (1646). The Academy was formed by law students.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
